prerequisites: A Genesys Cloud organization with an account that has the 'OAuth > Client > Add' permission required to create an OAuth client.
An OAuth client configured with the Client Credentials grant type, which yields the Client ID and Client Secret used to authenticate.

Your organization's region-specific endpoint for the tenant_endpoint field (for example login.mypurecloud.com for Americas US East, login.mypurecloud.ie for EMEA Dublin, or login.usw2.pure.cloud for Americas US West).
A start_date marking the earliest point from which to replicate data.

authMethods.name: OAuth 2.0 Client Credentials
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with a Client ID and Client Secret from a Genesys Cloud OAuth client configured with the Client Credentials grant. This grant is the single-step flow intended for non-user, automated applications, and the Client Secret acts as the application password used when requesting access tokens. Provide both values as the client_id and client_secret fields.

setupSteps.title: Determine your tenant endpoint
setupSteps.body: Identify the login endpoint that matches your Genesys Cloud organization's deployed region, since the API endpoint corresponds to the organization's region. Examples include login.mypurecloud.com (Americas US East), login.usw2.pure.cloud (Americas US West), login.mypurecloud.ie (EMEA Dublin), and login.mypurecloud.de (EMEA Frankfurt). Use this value for the tenant_endpoint field.

setupSteps.title: Create an OAuth client
setupSteps.body: In Genesys Cloud, go to Menu > IT and Integrations > OAuth and click Add client. Enter an application name and optional description. You need the 'OAuth > Client > Add' permission to do this.

setupSteps.title: Select the Client Credentials grant
setupSteps.body: Choose the Client Credentials grant type, which provides single-step authentication for non-user applications such as automated jobs. Click Next to configure type-specific settings, then click Save.

setupSteps.title: Copy the generated credentials
setupSteps.body: On save, Genesys Cloud generates the Client ID and Client Secret. Copy and securely store the Client Secret because it is displayed only once and is not retrievable after creation. Click Finish.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the Client ID into client_id and the Client Secret into client_secret. Set tenant_endpoint to your region's endpoint and set start_date to the earliest date from which to replicate.

sources.title: Create an OAuth client - Genesys Cloud Resource Center
